TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Su'aci, title = Su'aci, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Su'aci} }

S.FORM: = Su'aci = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Tawyuncyu ka alang Su'aci. 22 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 84 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 88% niqan 74 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 12% niqan 10 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 30%, Rukai 7%, Cou 19%, Hla'alua 30%, Amis 2%.
S.PHON: = su'aʦi = gaga mniq kawsjuŋsu tawjunʦju ka alaŋ su'aʦi. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, ** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, ɾukai *%, ʦou **%, ħla'alua **%, amis *%.
S.FORM: = Su'aci = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Tawyuncyu ka alang Su'aci. 22 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 84 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 88% niqan 74 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 12% niqan 10 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 30%, Rukai 7%, Cou 19%, Hla'alua 30%, Amis 2%.
S.PHON: = su'aʦi = gaga mniq kawsjuŋsu tawjunʦju ka alaŋ su'aʦi. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, ** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, ɾukai *%, ʦou **%, ħla'alua **%, amis *%.
